title: Om Sivoham Lyrics Naan Kadavul
stanzas:
hara hara hara hara
hara hara hara hara
mahadev..

hara hara hara hara
hara hara hara hara
mahadev..

om shivo humom shivo hum
rudra naamam bhaje hum (2)

veera bhadraya
agni nethraya
gora souharaha

sakala lokaya
sarva bhoothaya
sathya sakshatkara
sambo sambo sankara

om shivo hum om shivo hum
rudra naamam bhaje hum
bhaje hum…

hara hara hara hara
hara hara hara hara
mahadev..

anda bramhanda koti
akila paripaalana
poorana jagathkarana
sathya deva devapriya

vedha vedhartha saara
yagna yagnomaya
nishtala dushta nigraha
saptha loga sourakshana

soma soorya agni lochana
swetha rishabha vaahana
soola paani bhujanga bhushana
tripura nasa rarthara

yoma kesa maha sena janaka
panchavaktra
parasuhasta namaha

om shivo hum
om shivo hum
rudra roopam bhaje hum
bhaje hum…

om shivo hum om shivo hum
rudra naamam bhaje hum
bhaje hum…

kala trikala nethra trinethra
soola trisoola gathram

sathya pravava dhivya prakasa
mantra swaroopa maatram

nishpra pankchadhi
nishta lankoham
nija poorna bodha hum hum
gathya gathmaagam
nithya bramhogam
swapna kasogam hum hum

sachit pramanam om om
moola pramegyam om om
agam bramhasmi om om
aham bramhasmi om om

gana gana gana gana
gana gana gana gana
sahasra kanta sapta viharaki

dama dama dama dama
duma duma duma duma
siva dama duga nadha viharaki

om shivo hum om shivo hum
rudra naamam bhaje hum
bhaje hum…

om shivo hum om shivo hum
rudra naamam bhaje hum
bhaje hum…

veera bhadraya agni nethraya
gora souharaha

om shivo hum
om shivo hum

seo.title: Om Sivoham Lyrics Naan Kadavul
seo.description: Full Om Sivoham songs lyrics, Naan Kadavul Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vaali, Music: Ilaiyaraaja, Singer(s): Vijay Prakash.
seo.keywords: Vaali, Naan Kadavul, Ilaiyaraaja, Vijay Prakash, Om Sivoham full lyrics, Naan Kadavul songs lyrics, Om Sivoham lyrics snippets, Om Sivoham WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Om Sivoham lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Om Sivoham'?

'Om Sivoham' is a devotional song that praises Lord Shiva, invoking his blessings and spiritual energy.

How does this song fit into the plot of 'Naan Kadavul'?

The song reflects the protagonist's spiritual journey and connection with the divine, highlighting themes of faith and devotion.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Vijay Prakash and composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Om Sivoham' released?

The song was released on February 6, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Om Sivoham', the protagonist expresses deep devotion and reverence towards Lord Shiva, encapsulating the essence of spirituality. The song's soothing melody and powerful lyrics evoke a sense of peace and connection with the divine. It serves as a pivotal moment in the film Naan Kadavul, illustrating the character's spiritual awakening. The heartfelt rendition by Vijay Prakash, combined with Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, creates an uplifting experience for listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Om Sivoham from Naan Kadavul is a mesmerizing devotional track that resonates with spiritual energy. With Vijay Prakash's powerful vocals and Ilaiyaraaja's enchanting composition, this song elevates the soul to divine heights. Experience the magic of this collaboration that beautifully captures the essence of devotion and reverence.
stanzaMeanings: We chant the name of Rudra, we chant the name of Rudra.
To the brave Bhadraya, with fiery eyes, we offer our respect.
To all worlds and all beings, we seek the truth and realization.
We call upon Sambo, the auspicious one, Sankara.
We chant the name of Rudra, we chant the name of Rudra.
To the creator of the universe, who maintains everything, we offer our respect.
The essence of the Vedas, the purpose of sacrifices, we seek protection from evil across the seven worlds.
To the moon, sun, and fire, who rides the white bull, with a trident in hand, we offer our respect.
To the one with matted hair, the great warrior, with five faces and an axe, we bow down.
We chant the name of Rudra, we chant the name of Rudra.
We chant the name of Rudra, we chant the name of Rudra.
To the one who sees all times, with three eyes and a trident, we offer our respect.
The truth flows, divine light manifests, we seek the essence of the mantra.
Free from impurities, I am complete, I am eternal, I am the ultimate reality.
The essence of existence, I am, I am, I am Brahman.
We chant the name of Rudra, we chant the name of Rudra.
We chant the name of Rudra, we chant the name of Rudra.
To the brave Bhadraya, with fiery eyes, we offer our respect.
To all worlds and all beings, we seek the truth and realization.
We call upon Sambo, the auspicious one, Sankara.
We chant the name of Rudra, we chant the name of Rudra.
